message:
🐛 Hide AgentSelector spinner in cluster mode (#882)

When running in-cluster without the kc-agent, the AgentSelector
showed a perpetual loading spinner due to the WebSocket reconnect
loop. Now the selector renders nothing when no agents are loaded
and the kc-agent is unavailable, which is the expected state in
cluster mode.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
